name: MediaRead
title: MediaRead
syntax: long MediaRead(dword sourceReaderHandle, dword streamIndex, byte buffer[], dword length, char onReadCallback[]);
long MediaRead(dword sourceReaderHandle, dword streamIndex, int buffer[], dword length, char onReadCallback[]);
long MediaRead(dword sourceReaderHandle, dword streamIndex, long buffer[], dword length, char onReadCallback[]);
description: Reads sample data from the media source.

parameters.name: 0–0xFFFFFFFB
parameters.description: The zero-based index of a stream.

parameters.name: SOURCE_READER_ANY_STREAM 0xFFFFFFFE
parameters.description: Get the next available sample, regardless of which stream.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The buffer used to store the incoming data.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: The length of the data buffer.

parameters.name: onReadCallback
parameters.description: The name of the CAPL callback function (see OnMediaRead).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
